calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Daniel Riley, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bridge Property Management Company.
Wesley Finney, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by respondent Kenneth Thompson.
Plaintiff's unlawful detainer complaint was filed on April 19, 2019.
Defendant Kenneth Thompson filed his answer to plaintiff's complaint on April 24, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on April 26, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, May 13, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bridge Property Management Company, and against defendant Kenneth Thompson, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $1,395.00.
Holdover Damages - $372.00.
Costs - $335.00.

Total - $2,102.00.

Additionally, plaintiffs are entitled to Restitution & Possession of the premises located at 255 Woodside Avenue, Unit 304, San Francisco, CA 94127.

The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment for Possession Only was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported.

Appearances:
Plaintiff Bridge Property Management Company is present, represented by Wesley Finley.
Attorney Francisco Torres for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kenneth Thompson is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there is no appearance by defendant. The trial date of May 13, 2019 remains on calendar.
